title: Indiana DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes
description: Narrative research notes for Indiana DDS examiner and supervisor pay: administering agency (IN FSSA Disability Determination Bureau), examiner class title (Disability Claims Adjudicator, from WorkforIndiana postings) with class code not publicly identified, an Indiana broadband estimated grade (~28-29), estimated salary ranges ($53,559–$68,777; ~$57,945 avg) from private aggregators, non-union status (collective bargaining ended 2005, EO 15-13), and documented gaps. Markdown-only state (no sibling scheduled-rates.json).

source.publisher: Indiana State Personnel Department (SPD); IN Family and Social Services Administration (FSSA) Disability Determination Bureau
source.title: IN DDS salary research notes (WorkforIndiana postings + SPD salary grades; private-aggregator estimates)

update_cadence: ad hoc (estimates); IN salary grades published ~Aug
notes: Computed: agency and examiner class title (Disability Claims Adjudicator) confirmed via job postings, but the official IN salary schedule does not map the title to a grade, so the Grade 28-29 broadband and all salary figures are estimates from private databases ($53,559–$68,777; ~$57,945 avg). No formal supervisor classification found ('Lead Workers' informal). Non-union since 2005 (EO 15-13). Data currency Aug 2025 → temporal_coverage. No sibling scheduled-rates.json for IN.
